downloadAppChipHint: GitHub Releases. Android is a direct APK.
downloadModalLead: You are already using Arborito in the browser. You do not need to install anything to learn.
downloadModalLeadDesktop: You already have Arborito in this app. Get installers for Linux, Windows, or Android, for example on another device.
downloadVignetteHint: Same Arborito: install for your device if you want. Android is direct APK.
appUpdateBody: Arborito {version} is available. Update now? The app will download the installer, install quietly, and restart.
appUpdateFailed: Could not download the update. Try again later from GitHub Releases.
fetchFileProtocolHint: Open the app from a local server (for example http://localhost:8000) instead of loading the HTML straight from disk; the browser blocks most HTTPS requests made from file:// pages.
fetchSslTlsHint: That usually means the browser could not complete HTTPS with that server (old TLS, bad certificate, or the network is blocking that host). Try another Wi‑Fi or mobile data, another mirror URL if the tree offers one, or fix TLS on the server. Arborito cannot bypass your phone’s SSL checks.
fileNotFound: File not found in local garden.
gameIframeMissing: Could not open the game frame. Try again.
inlineGameWarning: You are about to load an external game that may include third-party content. Continue? (This notice will not be shown again.)
lessonQuizRequired: Score at least 80% on this section's quiz before continuing.
lessonQuizOptionalHint: There's a quiz here. Tap Next again to skip.
missionText: Arborito is Treesys' first product: free software to learn on visual lesson maps. Treesys exists to use technology to address humanity's problems, starting with education, then growing into broader challenges. For about two years one maintainer has been building this public GPL forest; at this alpha stage some drafts used language-model tools, and everything published here is human-reviewed. Explore the map, plant a lesson, or join in: teachers, translators, and developers welcome.
certPrintBlocked: Pop-up blocked. Allow pop-ups to download the diploma.
